segments.text: He's diving in SO incredibly deep! What would normally— if that up B connected at just the right spot, he'd be completely done, but— whoa!
segments.original_text: どんだけ深くに来るのめちゃくちゃ深く来た普通に何だろう 上 b がちょうどよく行く位置だったらさあ死んでますがピッチャーうわぁ
エイガオンからエイハを

full_text: He's diving in SO incredibly deep! What would normally— if that up B connected at just the right spot, he'd be completely done, but— whoa! From Aigaon, into—

corrections.corrected: エイガオンからエイハを
corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 映画音→エイガオン, 映画→エイハ
